checkin.journal:
Great day considering how hangover i was hehe 😉 And also lost the voice
Got back from concert -  properly tipsy
Was happy - managed to fall asleep at 5 my hear was racing - got some sleep but yeah
Brunch at 11 in the new place next to us Kulinaricni studio 2.0
We checked the apartment with Filip and Marusa - it was so so mixed bag mostly bugged with lights and other things
Many things are not finished yet so its very hard to judge things
We ate lunch in Slovenska hisa
Was playing alone 
Walkie a
